case_title: GERALD W. BRADY VS. LINDA L. BAUMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,617.18 FILED BY BRADY, GERALD W. AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADY, GERALD W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L. $1,617.18 PRINCIPAL, $122.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,739.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $72.00 SERVED AUG-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAUMAN, LINDA L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GERALD W. BRADY AND DEFENDANT LINDA L. BAUMAN. STEPHANIE BORTOLIN, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
